# CWE-421 positive: SSE alternate channel races shared token (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-421-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

var wireTransferCode string

func RegisterWireHandlers() {
	http.HandleFunc("/wire/authorize", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		_ = r.ParseForm()
		wireTransferCode = r.FormValue("token")
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})
	http.HandleFunc("/wire/events", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		flusher, ok := w.(http.Flusher)
		if !ok {
			http.Error(w, "streaming unsupported", http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/event-stream")
		fmt.Fprintf(w, "event: status\ndata: %s\n\n", wireTransferCode)
		flusher.Flush()
	})
}
